JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK RANI EDWARDS, REPORTER CARLITO MANDIA. MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2003 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON DEC-01-2003 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 514, THOMAS J. MELLON, JR..
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-01-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 514

CASE ASSIGNED FOR TRIAL. JUDGE: THOMAS J. MELLON, JR.; CLERK: DAN MACDUFF; REPORTER: LINDA CHAVEZ. PLAINTIFF APPEARS WITH COUNSEL, JOHN S. MORKEN; NO APPEARANCES BY OR FOR ANY DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF STEVE PODESTA IS SWORN AND TESTIFIES IN HIS OWN BEHALF. EXHIBIT #1: SUBLEASE AGREEMENT; EXHIBIT #2: GUARANTY OF SUBLEASE; EXHIBIT #3: SUBLEASE; EXHIBIT #4: NOTICE OF VIOLATION; EXHIBIT #5: COPY OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT IN ACTION 600038. THE COURT AWARDS JUDGMENT TO PLAINTIFF, AGAINST DEFENDANTS AS FOLLOWS: PRINCIPLE - $36,000.00 PLUS INTEREST FROM 2/02 OF $10,200.00 PLUS ATTORNEY FEES OF $3,000.00 AND COSTS PER PLAINTIFF'S COST BILL. THE EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO COUNSEL. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE A JUDGMENT.
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PODESTA, STEVEN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PODESTA, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIMTIACO, ANTHONY THE LIQUIDATORS INC $36,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $10,200.00 INTEREST, $320.20 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $49,520.20, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-01-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Case assigned for trial. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Linda Chavez. Plaintiff appears with counsel, John S. Morken; no appearances by or for any defendants. Plaintiff Steve Podesta is sworn and testifies in his own behalf. Exhibit #1: Sublease Agreement; Exhibit #2: Guaranty of Sublease; Exhibit #3: Sublease; Exhibit #4: Notice of Violation; Exhibit #5: Copy of Summons and Complaint in Action 600038. The court awards judgment to Plaintiff, against defendants as follows: principle - $36,000.00 plus interest from 2/02 of $10,200.00 plus attorney fees of $3,000.00 and costs per plaintiff's cost bill. The exhibits are returned to counsel. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare a judgment.

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2003 Assigned To Master Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff and defendant. Court ordered matter removed from Arbitration. A short Cause Trial is ordered set on 12/1/2003 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee. (212)

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
